# Create the enhanced transfers.html with working demo buttons transfers_html = ''' Admin Transfers | Global Banking Empowerment

Dashboard Approvals Transfers Customers Rules
Admin: Robbin Lee
5
Total Today
$12,686
Volume
0
Flagged
5
Completed
DateCustomerDescriptionAmountRuleStatusActions

''' with open('/mnt/agents/output/transfers.html', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(transfers_html) print("transfers.html created successfully!")
